gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/232)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَقُولُ فِي كُلِّ شَهْرٍ عُمْرَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘In every month is an Umra’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ’Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say, ’Every month there should be only one al-‘Umrah.’”
